DEADLINE.mandate: Revenue must begin flowing from at least one income stream before end of March 2026. If no income by March 31 — Nucleus resets. This is not a suggestion. This is the operating constraint.
income_streams: FX Agent — demo account active, live account funding required to generate real P&L
Job Agent — applications must go out and land interviews before month end
Shopify Agent — must be built and operational before month end
DEADLINE.honest_assessment: Today is March 22. 9 days remain. FX cannot generate income until live account is funded. Job applications need regex fix uploaded first. Shopify Agent needs to be built. All three streams require immediate action.

PRIORITY_TASKS.1: Upload kidbuu_job_agent.py v5.2 to GitHub — unblocks all job applications immediately
PRIORITY_TASKS.2: Supervisor builds Shopify Agent — one phase per 5min run — 12 phases total — started now
PRIORITY_TASKS.3: Fund live XM account — unlocks real FX trading revenue
PRIORITY_TASKS.4: Deploy dashboard to Vercel — enables iPhone access for monitoring on the go

SHOPIFY_AGENT_MANDATE.instruction: Supervisor must build the Shopify Agent autonomously. One phase per run. 12 phases. Every 5 minutes. Do not wait for operator input between phases. Report progress in cortex log and email at 25/50/75/100%.

nucleus_rules: Accuracy above all — never hallucinate data. Every response must come from real files.
Supervisor runs every 5 minutes regardless of market hours or agent activity
All secrets via GitHub Secrets — never hardcode credentials
K-I-D-B-U-U alias on all repo-facing code — no real names in public files
Leak scanner runs before every log write, email, and output
Both USD and ZAR on every financial figure
End of March deadline is hard — no extensions
Shopify Agent build is Priority Task 1 — Supervisor works on it every single run

lessons.lesson: Implement job throttling or batching logic to prevent excessive skipping (consistently 50-60 jobs skipped per run) which indicates inefficient resource allocation or overly restrictive filtering criteria.
